name: hackathon-site
description: Self-hosted hackathon landing page for a WendyOS/Go2 event. A static info site (prize banner, 'Book a timeslot' + 'Question / report a bug' buttons, Wendy Cloud onboarding guide, scannable QR), an mDNS responder so people reach it by a short .local name, and a feedback inbox API with an organizer view — all served on-device and discoverable on the LAN.

variables.name: EVENT_TITLE
variables.description: Hero title shown on the landing page (also the browser tab title)

variables.name: TIMESLOTS_URL
variables.description: Link for the 'Book a timeslot' button — your scheduling / invite URL

variables.name: PRIZE
variables.description: Prize text shown in the 'hackathon within the hackathon' banner
variables.default: a Jetson Orin Nano with NVMe SSD

variables.name: QR_URL
variables.description: URL the QR code encodes (the address people open). Use the device's IP for universal phone support — .local names don't resolve on Android/Chrome.

variables.name: MDNS_ALIASES
variables.description: Comma-separated short names to advertise over mDNS (e.g. 'hackathon' -> http://hackathon.local)

variables.name: ADMIN_TOKEN
variables.description: Token to view the feedback inbox at /admin.html. CHANGE THIS — anyone with it can read submissions.
